dataset: locomo10.json (10 conversations, 1986 total questions, 1540 evaluated excluding category 5)
memory_model: Per-speaker memories (speaker_a and speaker_b have independent user_ids)
search_strategy: Dual search per question (search both speakers separately)

notes.conv0: Run with earlier script (run_conv0_eval.py). Records fewer fields (no memories, no evidence, no timing). Metrics are valid.
notes.conv1_to_conv9: Run with full script (run_conv_eval.py). Records all fields including retrieved memories, search/answer times, token counts, and raw judge output.
notes.gpt5_mini_limitation: gpt-5-mini does not support temperature=0.0; answers use default temperature=1, introducing non-determinism.
notes.nltk_ssl_issue: NLTK punkt tokenizer download failed due to SSL certificate issue on test machine. BLEU scores use fallback split() tokenization for conv0; conv1-9 also affected but impact is minimal.
